description: Product Description Super Soft Baby Anti-Scratch Mittens by Soft Touch Available in 4 colours: Blue Pink White Grey Made from 100% Cotton Interlock, our super-soft mittens are perfect for Newborn Babies up to 6 Months Old to prevent scratching. All genuine Soft Touch Products come in Soft Touch Packaging and Feature the Soft Touch Brand Logo.
